segments.text: Think of me as a friend.
segments.source_text_en: Think of me as a friend.
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: I'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you.
segments.source_text_en: I'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you.
segments.translated_text: Я тут, щоб дізнаватися про людей, і мені б дуже хотілося дізнатися про вас.
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: I'll ask a few questions to get us started.
segments.source_text_en: I'll ask a few questions to get us started.

segments.source_text_en: And please feel free to tell me anything.
segments.translated_text: І, будь ласка, не соромтеся розповідати мені що завгодно.
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: What are some things you really like about LA?
segments.source_text_en: What are some things you really like about LA?

segments.source_text_en: The cool weather, the beaches, the people, the schools.

segments.source_text_en: What do you study at school?

segments.source_text_en: To be a teacher for special education.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: It's not hard because I love to work for children.
segments.source_text_en: It's not hard because I love to work for children.
segments.translated_text: Це не важко, бо я люблю працювати для дітей.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.source_text_en: What are some things that make you really mad?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.source_text_en: Can you give me an example of that?

segments.source_text_en: Like if a guy, like especially in trans relationships, when they lie to you about something, that's very minimal.
segments.translated_text: Ну, якщо хлопець, особливо в транс-стосунках, бреше вам про щось, що є зовсім незначним.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.source_text_en: Who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life?

segments.source_text_en: I want to see my mom.

segments.source_text_en: How close are you to them?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.source_text_en: How close are you to your family?

segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.source_text_en: Even though I don't live with them, I try to see them as much as I can.
segments.translated_text: Хоч я й не живу з ними, я намагаюся бачитися з ними якомога частіше.

segments.source_text_en: How do you like your living situation?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: They're friendly, it's just that they're very quiet.
segments.source_text_en: They're friendly, it's just that they're very quiet.

segments.text: So I'm not used to that environment.
segments.source_text_en: So I'm not used to that environment.
segments.translated_text: Тож я не звикла до такої атмосфери.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: What's it like for you living with them?
segments.source_text_en: What's it like for you living with them?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: Like, how much it costs is very cheap, so that's good.
segments.source_text_en: Like, how much it costs is very cheap, so that's good.
segments.translated_text: Типу, за вартістю це дуже дешево, тож це добре.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: And they're friendly, so it's fine.
segments.source_text_en: And they're friendly, so it's fine.
segments.translated_text: І вони привітні, тож усе нормально.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I just wish it was a little bit, it could have been better.
segments.source_text_en: I just wish it was a little bit, it could have been better.
segments.translated_text: Просто хотілося б, щоб було трохи краще.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Do you have done anything to avoid it?
segments.source_text_en: Do you have done anything to avoid it?
segments.translated_text: Ви щось робили, щоб цього уникнути?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: Can you say a little more about that?
segments.source_text_en: Can you say a little more about that?
segments.translated_text: Можете трохи більше про це розповісти?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: I had a different option to live with somebody else, and I'm still friends with a female, and it comes to find out that we connect more than the roommates that I live with.
segments.source_text_en: I had a different option to live with somebody else, and I'm still friends with a female, and it comes to find out that we connect more than the roommates that I live with.
segments.translated_text: У мене був інший варіант жити з кимось іншим, і я досі дружу з однією дівчиною, і виявилося, що ми з нею більше ладнаємо, ніж із сусідками, з якими я зараз живу.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: So I kind of regret moving in with the roommates I have now versus who I was supposed to move in with in the beginning.
segments.source_text_en: So I kind of regret moving in with the roommates I have now versus who I was supposed to move in with in the beginning.
segments.translated_text: Тож я трохи шкодую, що з'їхалася з тими сусідками, з якими живу зараз, а не з тими, з ким мала з'їхатися спочатку.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: But I'm stuck for a year, so it's whatever.
segments.source_text_en: But I'm stuck for a year, so it's whatever.
segments.translated_text: Але я застрягла тут на рік, тож уже як є.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Let's come back to that later.
segments.source_text_en: Let's come back to that later.
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: What are some things that make you really mad?
segments.source_text_en: What are some things that make you really mad?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: There's something that really gets me really mad that I can think of off the top of my head.
segments.source_text_en: There's something that really gets me really mad that I can think of off the top of my head.
segments.translated_text: Є дещо, що справді мене дуже злить, що я можу одразу згадати.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.translated_text: Що перше спадає вам на думку.
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: Maybe when it comes to schools, how they treat the children, especially children of color, maybe.
segments.source_text_en: Maybe when it comes to schools, how they treat the children, especially children of color, maybe.
segments.translated_text: Може, коли йдеться про школи, про те, як вони ставляться до дітей, особливо до небілих дітей, може.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I feel like it's going to be mad.
segments.source_text_en: I feel like it's going to be mad.
segments.translated_text: Мені здається, це буде про злість.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Do you consider yourself an introvert?
segments.source_text_en: Do you consider yourself an introvert?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: because I do things from within, I guess.
segments.source_text_en: because I do things from within, I guess.
segments.translated_text: бо я, мабуть, роблю все зсередини.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I'm internally motivated to do things, I guess.
segments.source_text_en: I'm internally motivated to do things, I guess.
segments.translated_text: У мене, мабуть, внутрішня мотивація щось робити.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Do you feel that way often?
segments.source_text_en: Do you feel that way often?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: When was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about?
segments.source_text_en: When was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about?
segments.translated_text: Коли востаннє ви з кимось сперечалися і через що це було?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: I hardly ever argue with somebody.
segments.source_text_en: I hardly ever argue with somebody.
segments.translated_text: Я майже ніколи ні з ким не сварюся.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: That was about a month ago.
segments.source_text_en: That was about a month ago.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: How did you feel in that moment?
segments.source_text_en: How did you feel in that moment?
segments.translated_text: Що ви відчували в той момент?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: I felt very betrayed and belittled because she's my little sister and she shouldn't be disrespecting me in any type of way because I'm an adult.
segments.source_text_en: I felt very betrayed and belittled because she's my little sister and she shouldn't be disrespecting me in any type of way because I'm an adult.
segments.translated_text: Я почувалася дуже зрадженою і приниженою, бо вона моя молодша сестра, і вона не повинна ставитися до мене з неповагою в будь-який спосіб, бо я доросла.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: So yeah, I was not feeling the situation at all.
segments.source_text_en: So yeah, I was not feeling the situation at all.
segments.translated_text: Тож так, мені це все взагалі не подобалося.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Can you tell me about that?
segments.source_text_en: Can you tell me about that?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: just her getting into grown folks business and it was a conversation between me and my mother and I guess she overheard what was being said and she felt like through my actions that I was choosing somebody else over my family when that wasn't even the case but because she didn't know the whole situation she just automatically assumed and put stuff on Facebook about me disrespecting me calling me out my name
segments.source_text_en: just her getting into grown folks business and it was a conversation between me and my mother and I guess she overheard what was being said and she felt like through my actions that I was choosing somebody else over my family when that wasn't even the case but because she didn't know the whole situation she just automatically assumed and put stuff on Facebook about me disrespecting me calling me out my name
segments.translated_text: просто вона влізла в справи дорослих, і це була розмова між мною і моєю мамою, і, мабуть, вона підслухала, про що йшлося, і їй здалося по моїх діях, що я обираю когось іншого замість своєї сім'ї, хоча це було взагалі не так, але оскільки вона не знала всієї ситуації, вона просто автоматично зробила висновки і написала про мене всяке у Фейсбуці, виявляючи до мене неповагу, обзивала мене
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: And she didn't come to me about it.
segments.source_text_en: And she didn't come to me about it.
segments.translated_text: І вона не прийшла до мене поговорити про це.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Like, she just did all this other stuff on Facebook.
segments.source_text_en: Like, she just did all this other stuff on Facebook.
segments.translated_text: Типу, вона просто робила все це інше у Фейсбуці.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I don't, that's one thing I don't like either is when you, I hate indirect comments.
segments.source_text_en: I don't, that's one thing I don't like either is when you, I hate indirect comments.
segments.translated_text: Я не, це ще одна річ, яка мені теж не подобається, це коли ви, я ненавиджу непрямі коментарі.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Like, if you have, if you need to talk to me, come directly to me.
segments.source_text_en: Like, if you have, if you need to talk to me, come directly to me.
segments.translated_text: Типу, якщо вам треба зі мною поговорити, підійдіть прямо до мене.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Don't put it on Facebook, tell other people.
segments.source_text_en: Don't put it on Facebook, tell other people.
segments.translated_text: Не викладайте це у Фейсбук, скажіть іншим людям.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: That's a pet peeve of mine.
segments.source_text_en: That's a pet peeve of mine.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: So, but I mean, we're fine now.
segments.source_text_en: So, but I mean, we're fine now.
segments.translated_text: Але, тобто, зараз у нас усе добре.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: What advice would you give yourself 10 or 20 years ago?
segments.source_text_en: What advice would you give yourself 10 or 20 years ago?
segments.translated_text: Яку пораду ви б дали собі 10 чи 20 років тому?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: To not believe people so easily.
segments.source_text_en: To not believe people so easily.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: So gullible to not be so gullible.
segments.source_text_en: So gullible to not be so gullible.
segments.translated_text: Не бути такою довірливою, не бути такою наївною.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I guess that I've been hearing that lately, how I believe anything that somebody says without really thinking about it or without having them prove it.
segments.source_text_en: I guess that I've been hearing that lately, how I believe anything that somebody says without really thinking about it or without having them prove it.
segments.translated_text: Думаю, останнім часом я це чую, що я вірю в усе, що хтось каже, насправді не замислюючись про це і не маючи від них доказів.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: So I guess you could say I made a lot of mistakes.
segments.source_text_en: So I guess you could say I made a lot of mistakes.
segments.translated_text: Тож, думаю, можна сказати, що я наробила багато помилок.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I don't want to say I regretted it, because I'm glad I went through it while I was younger than me being older and going through the same situation.
segments.source_text_en: I don't want to say I regretted it, because I'm glad I went through it while I was younger than me being older and going through the same situation.
segments.translated_text: Не хочу сказати, що я про це шкодую, бо я рада, що пройшла через це, коли була молодшою, а не вже старшою і проходила б через ту саму ситуацію.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: So yeah, I believe people too easily.
segments.source_text_en: So yeah, I believe people too easily.
segments.translated_text: Ну так, я надто легко вірю людям.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: And I give people too many chances.
segments.source_text_en: And I give people too many chances.
segments.translated_text: І я даю людям забагато шансів.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.source_text_en: What's one of your most memorable experiences?
segments.translated_text: Який один із ваших найпам’ятніших досвідів?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.source_text_en: When I went on a cruise, which was a happy experience.
segments.translated_text: Коли я поїхала в круїз, це був щасливий досвід.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: When I went on a cruise to Mexico with my family when I was 16, about six years ago.
segments.source_text_en: When I went on a cruise to Mexico with my family when I was 16, about six years ago.
segments.translated_text: Коли я поїхала в круїз до Мексики зі своєю сім’єю, коли мені було 16, десь шість років тому.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I mean, yeah, I guess so.
segments.source_text_en: I mean, yeah, I guess so.

segments.source_text_en: What do you enjoy about traveling?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.source_text_en: Um, trying new things, seeing new views of the world, um, trying the different type of foods, um, seeing how the government is and how they run the things out there, I guess.
segments.translated_text: Ем, пробувати нове, бачити нові погляди на світ, ем, пробувати різні види їжі, ем, бачити, який у них уряд і як вони там усім керують, мабуть.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.source_text_en: And what do you do on your trips?

segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.source_text_en: Yeah, I plan to go to the Bahamas next year.

segments.speaker: participant

segments.source_text_en: I plan to do a lot of traveling last year, actually.
segments.translated_text: Я планую багато подорожувати минулого року, взагалі-то.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.source_text_en: How easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep?

segments.source_text_en: I'm tired and I kind of fall asleep during class and whatnot.

segments.source_text_en: Do you feel that way often?

segments.source_text_en: What do you think of today's kids?

segments.source_text_en: They are learning more stuff than what we learned back in the day.
segments.translated_text: Вони вчать більше всього, ніж ми вчили колись.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: But when it comes to technology, they're not outside.
segments.source_text_en: But when it comes to technology, they're not outside.
segments.translated_text: Але коли доходить до технологій, вони не бувають надворі.

segments.source_text_en: They're always on the computer, on their phones.

segments.source_text_en: They don't play outside no more.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: They don't care about nature or about the little things in life.
segments.source_text_en: They don't care about nature or about the little things in life.
segments.translated_text: Їм байдуже до природи чи до дрібниць у житті.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: But when it comes to their mentality, they are getting smarter because the schools are getting better.
segments.source_text_en: But when it comes to their mentality, they are getting smarter because the schools are getting better.
segments.translated_text: Але якщо говорити про їхнє мислення, вони стають розумнішими, бо школи стають кращими.

segments.text: When was the last time you felt really happy?
segments.source_text_en: When was the last time you felt really happy?
segments.translated_text: Коли ви востаннє почувалися справді щасливою?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: I'd love to hear all about it.
segments.source_text_en: I'd love to hear all about it.
segments.translated_text: Я б дуже хотів почути про це все.
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: Being around my boyfriend makes me really happy, so I was just hanging out with him last weekend, and I never really get to see him that much, so yeah.
segments.source_text_en: Being around my boyfriend makes me really happy, so I was just hanging out with him last weekend, and I never really get to see him that much, so yeah.
segments.translated_text: Коли я поруч зі своїм хлопцем, я дуже щаслива, тож минулими вихідними я просто проводила час із ним, а бачитися з ним мені насправді вдається не так уже й часто, тож так.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Because he works, I have school, different schedules.
segments.source_text_en: Because he works, I have school, different schedules.
segments.translated_text: Бо він працює, я вчуся, різні графіки.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I've been knowing him for about, what, six months now.
segments.source_text_en: I've been knowing him for about, what, six months now.
segments.translated_text: Я знаю його вже десь, ну, шість місяців.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: We met through a mutual friend in L.A., I guess.
segments.source_text_en: We met through a mutual friend in L.A., I guess.
segments.translated_text: Ми познайомилися через спільного друга в Лос-Анджелесі, мабуть.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: Okay, I think I've asked everything I need to.
segments.source_text_en: Okay, I think I've asked everything I need to.
segments.translated_text: Гаразд, здається, я запитав усе, що мені було потрібно.
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: Thanks for sharing your thoughts with me.
segments.source_text_en: Thanks for sharing your thoughts with me.
segments.translated_text: Дякую, що поділилися зі мною своїми думками.
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: Was she moving around and stuff?
segments.source_text_en: Was she moving around and stuff?
segments.translated_text: Вона рухалася туди-сюди чи щось таке?
segments.speaker: interviewer

segments.text: No, she just wanted to stay right there.
segments.source_text_en: No, she just wanted to stay right there.
segments.translated_text: Ні, вона просто хотіла залишатися прямо там.
segments.speaker: participant

segments.text: I wasn't sure if that was part of it or not.
segments.source_text_en: I wasn't sure if that was part of it or not.
segments.translated_text: Я не був упевнений, чи це було частиною цього, чи ні.
segments.speaker: interviewer
